description: Mockaroo is a hosted random test data generator and API mocking service. It lets users define schemas and generate sample datasets in formats like JSON, CSV, SQL, and XML.
summary: Mockaroo exposes one documented HTTP API at `https://api.mockaroo.com/api` for generating data and managing datasets/types, authenticated with a Mockaroo API key passed as query parameter `key` or header `X-API-Key`.
